records.m_Talk_ENG: ...And so, we successfully erased the rescuee's memories regarding this incident.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...And so, we successfully erased the rescuee's memories regarding this incident.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...And so, we successfully erased the rescuee's memories regarding this incident.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That concludes my briefing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That concludes my briefing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That concludes my briefing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well, good work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well, good work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well, good work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for cooperating in the Administration's anti-Corruption operation, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for cooperating in the Administration's anti-Corruption operation, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for cooperating in the Administration's anti-Corruption operation, Yaksha Deputy Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were able to complete the operation without any civilian casualties thanks to your cooperation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were able to complete the operation without any civilian casualties thanks to your cooperation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were able to complete the operation without any civilian casualties thanks to your cooperation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I don't think there's any need to thank me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I don't think there's any need to thank me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I don't think there's any need to thank me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe any division of the Administration would've willingly cooperated with the operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe any division of the Administration would've willingly cooperated with the operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe any division of the Administration would've willingly cooperated with the operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, of course, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, of course, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, of course, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard that Yaksha's <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> played a great role in this operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard that Yaksha's <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> played a great role in this operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard that Yaksha's <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> played a great role in this operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard that your division had weakened after <color=#ffd34c>that incident</color>...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard that your division had weakened after <color=#ffd34c>that incident</color>...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard that your division had weakened after <color=#ffd34c>that incident</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But seeing your division recovering puts my mind at ease.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But seeing your division recovering puts my mind at ease.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But seeing your division recovering puts my mind at ease.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. Well, thank you for your concern.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu. Well, thank you for your concern.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu. Well, thank you for your concern.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, if you need any help while you're in the Normalside, please don't hesitate to call.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, if you need any help while you're in the Normalside, please don't hesitate to call.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, if you need any help while you're in the Normalside, please don't hesitate to call.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be more than happy to help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be more than happy to help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be more than happy to help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That incident...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That incident...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That incident...

records.m_Talk_ENG: All Yaksha members, please calm down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All Yaksha members, please calm down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All Yaksha members, please calm down.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Don
8kt be ridiculous, Moneka!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Don
8kt be ridiculous, Moneka!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Don
8kt be ridiculous, Moneka!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How could you tell us to accept that decision?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How could you tell us to accept that decision?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How could you tell us to accept that decision?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Daniel. Moneka is just relaying the Administration's decision.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Daniel. Moneka is just relaying the Administration's decision.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Daniel. Moneka is just relaying the Administration's decision.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Getting angry at Moneka will change nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Getting angry at Moneka will change nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Getting angry at Moneka will change nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I agree with Daniel, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I agree with Daniel, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I agree with Daniel, Deputy Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's the Administration Hive Control's decision.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's the Administration Hive Control's decision.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's the Administration Hive Control's decision.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think they're allowed to infringe on the autonomy of our division.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think they're allowed to infringe on the autonomy of our division.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think they're allowed to infringe on the autonomy of our division.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I agree that we should restructure the division since Commander <color=#ffd34c>Lionel</color> is absent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I agree that we should restructure the division since Commander <color=#ffd34c>Lionel</color> is absent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I agree that we should restructure the division since Commander <color=#ffd34c>Lionel</color> is absent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if a new Commander is to be appointed...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if a new Commander is to be appointed...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if a new Commander is to be appointed...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think that person should be you, Deputy Commander Judy Swift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think that person should be you, Deputy Commander Judy Swift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think that person should be you, Deputy Commander Judy Swift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not a <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> from the future who hasn't even awakened as a Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not a <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> from the future who hasn't even awakened as a Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not a <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> from the future who hasn't even awakened as a Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's right!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's right!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's right!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one who led Yaksha alongside Commander Lionel!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one who led Yaksha alongside Commander Lionel!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one who led Yaksha alongside Commander Lionel!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Not this thieving cat that we know nothing about
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Not this thieving cat that we know nothing about
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Not this thieving cat that we know nothing about
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: However.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Terrabrain's causality calculations and predictions have never been wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Terrabrain's causality calculations and predictions have never been wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Terrabrain's causality calculations and predictions have never been wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if we deliver our opinion, the Administration will take it as a variable and perhaps provide us with the next best solution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if we deliver our opinion, the Administration will take it as a variable and perhaps provide us with the next best solution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if we deliver our opinion, the Administration will take it as a variable and perhaps provide us with the next best solution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that's all that it is. A second-best solution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that's all that it is. A second-best solution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that's all that it is. A second-best solution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Furthermore, there is no guarantee that it'll be to our liking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Furthermore, there is no guarantee that it'll be to our liking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Furthermore, there is no guarantee that it'll be to our liking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, oh, you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, oh, you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, oh, you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can tell what everyone is thinking from all your ears and tails.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can tell what everyone is thinking from all your ears and tails.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can tell what everyone is thinking from all your ears and tails.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand your frustration, but there's no need to worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand your frustration, but there's no need to worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand your frustration, but there's no need to worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I wasn't chosen as the next Commander, I'm sure there's a good reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I wasn't chosen as the next Commander, I'm sure there's a good reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I wasn't chosen as the next Commander, I'm sure there's a good reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if she is chosen as our next Commander, I'm sure there's good reason for that too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if she is chosen as our next Commander, I'm sure there's good reason for that too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if she is chosen as our next Commander, I'm sure there's good reason for that too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So first, let's go meet her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So first, let's go meet her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So first, let's go meet her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It won't be too late... to decide after we bring a stray cat to her new home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It won't be too late... to decide after we bring a stray cat to her new home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It won't be too late... to decide after we bring a stray cat to her new home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After we bring a stray cat to her new home...
records.m_Talk_DEU: After we bring a stray cat to her new home...
records.m_Talk_FRA: After we bring a stray cat to her new home...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy Commander!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy Commander!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The rookie...! She's awake!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The rookie...! She's awake!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The rookie...! She's awake!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rise and shine, troublemaker?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rise and shine, troublemaker?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rise and shine, troublemaker?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it because you're a firefighter? Haven't you been called reckless before?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it because you're a firefighter? Haven't you been called reckless before?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it because you're a firefighter? Haven't you been called reckless before?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? Does it hurt anywhere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? Does it hurt anywhere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? Does it hurt anywhere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I think I'm all right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I think I'm all right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I think I'm all right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who knew a rookie Counter who doesn't even know how to use CRF properly could fight a Category 3 C.O. on her own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who knew a rookie Counter who doesn't even know how to use CRF properly could fight a Category 3 C.O. on her own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who knew a rookie Counter who doesn't even know how to use CRF properly could fight a Category 3 C.O. on her own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But seeing how you went neck-and-neck with a Category 3 on your first mission, I think you have potential.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But seeing how you went neck-and-neck with a Category 3 on your first mission, I think you have potential.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But seeing how you went neck-and-neck with a Category 3 on your first mission, I think you have potential.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Don't you think you're inflating her ego a little too much?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Don't you think you're inflating her ego a little too much?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Don't you think you're inflating her ego a little too much?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A lousy Category 3 C.O.... I could take one on if I was given enough time and resources too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A lousy Category 3 C.O.... I could take one on if I was given enough time and resources too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A lousy Category 3 C.O.... I could take one on if I was given enough time and resources too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, are you being jealous right now, Justine Maisy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, are you being jealous right now, Justine Maisy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, are you being jealous right now, Justine Maisy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: J-jealous?! N-no!
records.m_Talk_DEU: J-jealous?! N-no!
records.m_Talk_FRA: J-jealous?! N-no!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a fact! Non-fiction! Reality TV!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a fact! Non-fiction! Reality TV!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a fact! Non-fiction! Reality TV!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can I ask you a question?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can I ask you a question?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can I ask you a question?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? What do you want to know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? What do you want to know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? What do you want to know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration is able to predict Corruption disasters, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration is able to predict Corruption disasters, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration is able to predict Corruption disasters, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although there are many variables at play, they can make a rough prediction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although there are many variables at play, they can make a rough prediction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although there are many variables at play, they can make a rough prediction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Then, why were you late to the fire that time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Then, why were you late to the fire that time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Then, why were you late to the fire that time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the Administration was a little quicker, then couldn't they have saved everyone there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the Administration was a little quicker, then couldn't they have saved everyone there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the Administration was a little quicker, then couldn't they have saved everyone there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, my colleagues, and even that kid...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, my colleagues, and even that kid...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, my colleagues, and even that kid...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Answer me. Am I wrong?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Answer me. Am I wrong?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Answer me. Am I wrong?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
That's nonsense! The Counterside Effect that day was
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
That's nonsense! The Counterside Effect that day was
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
That's nonsense! The Counterside Effect that day was
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Justine!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Justine!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Justine!

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-Deputy Commander?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-Deputy Commander?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-Deputy Commander?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm sorry. I'm a little thirsty. Could you get me some carrot juice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm sorry. I'm a little thirsty. Could you get me some carrot juice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm sorry. I'm a little thirsty. Could you get me some carrot juice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get you an ice-cold one!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get you an ice-cold one!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get you an ice-cold one!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry for what happened that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry for what happened that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry for what happened that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, if the Administration was a little faster, the outcome might have been different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, if the Administration was a little faster, the outcome might have been different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, if the Administration was a little faster, the outcome might have been different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the Administration is an organization that manages the causality of this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the Administration is an organization that manages the causality of this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the Administration is an organization that manages the causality of this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The more the Counterside Effect is exposed to the outside, the more it will result in accelerating the world's Corruption rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The more the Counterside Effect is exposed to the outside, the more it will result in accelerating the world's Corruption rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The more the Counterside Effect is exposed to the outside, the more it will result in accelerating the world's Corruption rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know it's difficult for you to understand, but... saving you was the best we could do in that situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know it's difficult for you to understand, but... saving you was the best we could do in that situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know it's difficult for you to understand, but... saving you was the best we could do in that situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The best you could do...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The best you could do...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The best you could do...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You could've saved everyone, but you chose not to save those in danger! How can you call that doing your best?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You could've saved everyone, but you chose not to save those in danger! How can you call that doing your best?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You could've saved everyone, but you chose not to save those in danger! How can you call that doing your best?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can blame me all you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can blame me all you want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can blame me all you want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it won't change what has already happened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it won't change what has already happened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it won't change what has already happened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether you believe it or not... it's still the truth of this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether you believe it or not... it's still the truth of this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether you believe it or not... it's still the truth of this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it. There's only one truth that I believe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it. There's only one truth that I believe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it. There's only one truth that I believe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excellent firefighters... never give up in any situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excellent firefighters... never give up in any situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excellent firefighters... never give up in any situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They should be able to save the lives of rescuees and themselves. That's what I was taught.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They should be able to save the lives of rescuees and themselves. That's what I was taught.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They should be able to save the lives of rescuees and themselves. That's what I was taught.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're being arrogant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're being arrogant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're being arrogant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not even the Administration could save them all. And there will come a time when you have to make a choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not even the Administration could save them all. And there will come a time when you have to make a choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not even the Administration could save them all. And there will come a time when you have to make a choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure you can handle that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure you can handle that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure you can handle that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can I handle it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can I handle it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can I handle it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been handling it long before I came here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been handling it long before I came here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been handling it long before I came here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have something to ask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have something to ask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have something to ask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said that the Administration's Yaksha Division consists of Bygone Counters, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said that the Administration's Yaksha Division consists of Bygone Counters, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said that the Administration's Yaksha Division consists of Bygone Counters, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then accept me as a member.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then accept me as a member.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then accept me as a member.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you hated the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you hated the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you hated the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm not interested in such grandiose and absurd ideas about causality, the world, and so on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm not interested in such grandiose and absurd ideas about causality, the world, and so on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm not interested in such grandiose and absurd ideas about causality, the world, and so on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But after using this power to save someone, I realized something I had forgotten.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But after using this power to save someone, I realized something I had forgotten.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But after using this power to save someone, I realized something I had forgotten.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm still a firefighter, and this fire suit is my determination.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm still a firefighter, and this fire suit is my determination.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm still a firefighter, and this fire suit is my determination.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't mind using any means necessary to rescue people in a fire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't mind using any means necessary to rescue people in a fire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't mind using any means necessary to rescue people in a fire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if I have the Administration's intel and power... I'll be able to save others whom I couldn't save before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if I have the Administration's intel and power... I'll be able to save others whom I couldn't save before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if I have the Administration's intel and power... I'll be able to save others whom I couldn't save before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I want you to accept me into your division, Judy Swift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I want you to accept me into your division, Judy Swift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I want you to accept me into your division, Judy Swift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because... that's the one duty that I must bear as the sole survivor of that fire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because... that's the one duty that I must bear as the sole survivor of that fire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because... that's the one duty that I must bear as the sole survivor of that fire.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...And so, we successfully erased the rescuee's memories regarding this incident.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...And so, we successfully erased the rescuee's memories regarding this incident.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...And so, we successfully erased the rescuee's memories regarding this incident.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That concludes my briefing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That concludes my briefing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That concludes my briefing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well, good work.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well, good work.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well, good work.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for cooperating in the Administration's anti-Corruption operation, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for cooperating in the Administration's anti-Corruption operation, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for cooperating in the Administration's anti-Corruption operation, Yaksha Deputy Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We were able to complete the operation without any civilian casualties thanks to your cooperation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We were able to complete the operation without any civilian casualties thanks to your cooperation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We were able to complete the operation without any civilian casualties thanks to your cooperation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I don't think there's any need to thank me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I don't think there's any need to thank me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I don't think there's any need to thank me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe any division of the Administration would've willingly cooperated with the operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe any division of the Administration would've willingly cooperated with the operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe any division of the Administration would've willingly cooperated with the operation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, of course, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, of course, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, of course, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard that Yaksha's <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> played a great role in this operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard that Yaksha's <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> played a great role in this operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard that Yaksha's <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> played a great role in this operation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard that your division had weakened after <color=#ffd34c>that incident</color>...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard that your division had weakened after <color=#ffd34c>that incident</color>...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard that your division had weakened after <color=#ffd34c>that incident</color>...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But seeing your division recovering puts my mind at ease.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But seeing your division recovering puts my mind at ease.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But seeing your division recovering puts my mind at ease.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. Well, thank you for your concern.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu. Well, thank you for your concern.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu. Well, thank you for your concern.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, if you need any help while you're in the Normalside, please don't hesitate to call.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, if you need any help while you're in the Normalside, please don't hesitate to call.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, if you need any help while you're in the Normalside, please don't hesitate to call.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be more than happy to help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be more than happy to help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be more than happy to help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That incident...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That incident...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That incident...

root.m_Talk_ENG: All Yaksha members, please calm down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All Yaksha members, please calm down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All Yaksha members, please calm down.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Don
8kt be ridiculous, Moneka!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Don
8kt be ridiculous, Moneka!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Don
8kt be ridiculous, Moneka!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How could you tell us to accept that decision?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How could you tell us to accept that decision?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How could you tell us to accept that decision?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Daniel. Moneka is just relaying the Administration's decision.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Daniel. Moneka is just relaying the Administration's decision.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Daniel. Moneka is just relaying the Administration's decision.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Getting angry at Moneka will change nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Getting angry at Moneka will change nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Getting angry at Moneka will change nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I agree with Daniel, Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I agree with Daniel, Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I agree with Daniel, Deputy Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's the Administration Hive Control's decision.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's the Administration Hive Control's decision.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's the Administration Hive Control's decision.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think they're allowed to infringe on the autonomy of our division.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think they're allowed to infringe on the autonomy of our division.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think they're allowed to infringe on the autonomy of our division.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I agree that we should restructure the division since Commander <color=#ffd34c>Lionel</color> is absent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I agree that we should restructure the division since Commander <color=#ffd34c>Lionel</color> is absent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I agree that we should restructure the division since Commander <color=#ffd34c>Lionel</color> is absent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if a new Commander is to be appointed...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if a new Commander is to be appointed...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if a new Commander is to be appointed...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think that person should be you, Deputy Commander Judy Swift.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think that person should be you, Deputy Commander Judy Swift.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think that person should be you, Deputy Commander Judy Swift.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not a <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> from the future who hasn't even awakened as a Counter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not a <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> from the future who hasn't even awakened as a Counter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not a <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> from the future who hasn't even awakened as a Counter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's right!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's right!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's right!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one who led Yaksha alongside Commander Lionel!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one who led Yaksha alongside Commander Lionel!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one who led Yaksha alongside Commander Lionel!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Not this thieving cat that we know nothing about
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Not this thieving cat that we know nothing about
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Not this thieving cat that we know nothing about
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: However.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Terrabrain's causality calculations and predictions have never been wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Terrabrain's causality calculations and predictions have never been wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Terrabrain's causality calculations and predictions have never been wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if we deliver our opinion, the Administration will take it as a variable and perhaps provide us with the next best solution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if we deliver our opinion, the Administration will take it as a variable and perhaps provide us with the next best solution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if we deliver our opinion, the Administration will take it as a variable and perhaps provide us with the next best solution.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that's all that it is. A second-best solution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that's all that it is. A second-best solution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that's all that it is. A second-best solution.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Furthermore, there is no guarantee that it'll be to our liking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Furthermore, there is no guarantee that it'll be to our liking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Furthermore, there is no guarantee that it'll be to our liking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, oh, you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, oh, you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, oh, you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can tell what everyone is thinking from all your ears and tails.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can tell what everyone is thinking from all your ears and tails.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can tell what everyone is thinking from all your ears and tails.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand your frustration, but there's no need to worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understand your frustration, but there's no need to worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understand your frustration, but there's no need to worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I wasn't chosen as the next Commander, I'm sure there's a good reason.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I wasn't chosen as the next Commander, I'm sure there's a good reason.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I wasn't chosen as the next Commander, I'm sure there's a good reason.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if she is chosen as our next Commander, I'm sure there's good reason for that too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if she is chosen as our next Commander, I'm sure there's good reason for that too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if she is chosen as our next Commander, I'm sure there's good reason for that too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So first, let's go meet her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So first, let's go meet her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So first, let's go meet her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It won't be too late... to decide after we bring a stray cat to her new home.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It won't be too late... to decide after we bring a stray cat to her new home.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It won't be too late... to decide after we bring a stray cat to her new home.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After we bring a stray cat to her new home...
root.m_Talk_DEU: After we bring a stray cat to her new home...
root.m_Talk_FRA: After we bring a stray cat to her new home...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy Commander!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy Commander!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy Commander!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The rookie...! She's awake!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The rookie...! She's awake!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The rookie...! She's awake!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rise and shine, troublemaker?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rise and shine, troublemaker?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rise and shine, troublemaker?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it because you're a firefighter? Haven't you been called reckless before?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it because you're a firefighter? Haven't you been called reckless before?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it because you're a firefighter? Haven't you been called reckless before?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? Does it hurt anywhere?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? Does it hurt anywhere?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? Does it hurt anywhere?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I think I'm all right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I think I'm all right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I think I'm all right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who knew a rookie Counter who doesn't even know how to use CRF properly could fight a Category 3 C.O. on her own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who knew a rookie Counter who doesn't even know how to use CRF properly could fight a Category 3 C.O. on her own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who knew a rookie Counter who doesn't even know how to use CRF properly could fight a Category 3 C.O. on her own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But seeing how you went neck-and-neck with a Category 3 on your first mission, I think you have potential.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But seeing how you went neck-and-neck with a Category 3 on your first mission, I think you have potential.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But seeing how you went neck-and-neck with a Category 3 on your first mission, I think you have potential.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Don't you think you're inflating her ego a little too much?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Don't you think you're inflating her ego a little too much?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Don't you think you're inflating her ego a little too much?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A lousy Category 3 C.O.... I could take one on if I was given enough time and resources too!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A lousy Category 3 C.O.... I could take one on if I was given enough time and resources too!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A lousy Category 3 C.O.... I could take one on if I was given enough time and resources too!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, are you being jealous right now, Justine Maisy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, are you being jealous right now, Justine Maisy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, are you being jealous right now, Justine Maisy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: J-jealous?! N-no!
root.m_Talk_DEU: J-jealous?! N-no!
root.m_Talk_FRA: J-jealous?! N-no!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a fact! Non-fiction! Reality TV!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a fact! Non-fiction! Reality TV!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a fact! Non-fiction! Reality TV!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can I ask you a question?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can I ask you a question?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can I ask you a question?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? What do you want to know?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? What do you want to know?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? What do you want to know?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration is able to predict Corruption disasters, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration is able to predict Corruption disasters, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration is able to predict Corruption disasters, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although there are many variables at play, they can make a rough prediction.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although there are many variables at play, they can make a rough prediction.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although there are many variables at play, they can make a rough prediction.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Then, why were you late to the fire that time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Then, why were you late to the fire that time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Then, why were you late to the fire that time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the Administration was a little quicker, then couldn't they have saved everyone there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the Administration was a little quicker, then couldn't they have saved everyone there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the Administration was a little quicker, then couldn't they have saved everyone there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, my colleagues, and even that kid...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, my colleagues, and even that kid...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, my colleagues, and even that kid...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Answer me. Am I wrong?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Answer me. Am I wrong?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Answer me. Am I wrong?!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
That's nonsense! The Counterside Effect that day was
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
That's nonsense! The Counterside Effect that day was
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
That's nonsense! The Counterside Effect that day was
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Justine!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Justine!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Justine!

root.m_Talk_ENG: D-Deputy Commander?
root.m_Talk_DEU: D-Deputy Commander?
root.m_Talk_FRA: D-Deputy Commander?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm sorry. I'm a little thirsty. Could you get me some carrot juice?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm sorry. I'm a little thirsty. Could you get me some carrot juice?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm sorry. I'm a little thirsty. Could you get me some carrot juice?

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay!
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay!
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get you an ice-cold one!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get you an ice-cold one!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get you an ice-cold one!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry for what happened that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry for what happened that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry for what happened that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, if the Administration was a little faster, the outcome might have been different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, if the Administration was a little faster, the outcome might have been different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, if the Administration was a little faster, the outcome might have been different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the Administration is an organization that manages the causality of this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the Administration is an organization that manages the causality of this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the Administration is an organization that manages the causality of this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The more the Counterside Effect is exposed to the outside, the more it will result in accelerating the world's Corruption rate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The more the Counterside Effect is exposed to the outside, the more it will result in accelerating the world's Corruption rate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The more the Counterside Effect is exposed to the outside, the more it will result in accelerating the world's Corruption rate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know it's difficult for you to understand, but... saving you was the best we could do in that situation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know it's difficult for you to understand, but... saving you was the best we could do in that situation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know it's difficult for you to understand, but... saving you was the best we could do in that situation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The best you could do...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The best you could do...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The best you could do...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You could've saved everyone, but you chose not to save those in danger! How can you call that doing your best?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You could've saved everyone, but you chose not to save those in danger! How can you call that doing your best?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You could've saved everyone, but you chose not to save those in danger! How can you call that doing your best?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can blame me all you want.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can blame me all you want.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can blame me all you want.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it won't change what has already happened.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it won't change what has already happened.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it won't change what has already happened.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whether you believe it or not... it's still the truth of this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whether you believe it or not... it's still the truth of this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whether you believe it or not... it's still the truth of this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it. There's only one truth that I believe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it. There's only one truth that I believe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it. There's only one truth that I believe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excellent firefighters... never give up in any situation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excellent firefighters... never give up in any situation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excellent firefighters... never give up in any situation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They should be able to save the lives of rescuees and themselves. That's what I was taught.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They should be able to save the lives of rescuees and themselves. That's what I was taught.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They should be able to save the lives of rescuees and themselves. That's what I was taught.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're being arrogant.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're being arrogant.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're being arrogant.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not even the Administration could save them all. And there will come a time when you have to make a choice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not even the Administration could save them all. And there will come a time when you have to make a choice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not even the Administration could save them all. And there will come a time when you have to make a choice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure you can handle that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure you can handle that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure you can handle that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can I handle it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can I handle it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can I handle it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've been handling it long before I came here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've been handling it long before I came here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've been handling it long before I came here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have something to ask.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have something to ask.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have something to ask.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said that the Administration's Yaksha Division consists of Bygone Counters, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said that the Administration's Yaksha Division consists of Bygone Counters, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said that the Administration's Yaksha Division consists of Bygone Counters, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then accept me as a member.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then accept me as a member.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then accept me as a member.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you hated the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you hated the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you hated the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm not interested in such grandiose and absurd ideas about causality, the world, and so on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm not interested in such grandiose and absurd ideas about causality, the world, and so on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm not interested in such grandiose and absurd ideas about causality, the world, and so on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But after using this power to save someone, I realized something I had forgotten.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But after using this power to save someone, I realized something I had forgotten.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But after using this power to save someone, I realized something I had forgotten.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm still a firefighter, and this fire suit is my determination.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm still a firefighter, and this fire suit is my determination.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm still a firefighter, and this fire suit is my determination.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't mind using any means necessary to rescue people in a fire.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't mind using any means necessary to rescue people in a fire.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't mind using any means necessary to rescue people in a fire.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if I have the Administration's intel and power... I'll be able to save others whom I couldn't save before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if I have the Administration's intel and power... I'll be able to save others whom I couldn't save before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if I have the Administration's intel and power... I'll be able to save others whom I couldn't save before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, I want you to accept me into your division, Judy Swift.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, I want you to accept me into your division, Judy Swift.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I want you to accept me into your division, Judy Swift.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because... that's the one duty that I must bear as the sole survivor of that fire.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because... that's the one duty that I must bear as the sole survivor of that fire.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because... that's the one duty that I must bear as the sole survivor of that fire.
